# Tool Reference

> **Auto-generated** — run `npm run generate-docs` to rebuild.

## Policy Tier Legend

| Emoji | Tier | Default Decision |
|-------|------|------------------|
| 🔵 | Read | Allow |
| 🟡 | Write | Confirm |
| 🔴 | Destructive | Deny |

## `accounts`

Manage Front accounts — list, get, create, update, delete accounts, and manage account contacts.

|--------|------|
| `list` | 🔵 Read |
